text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're in the middle of training for the Kikuka
Sho, and Narita Brian is just about ready, when...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: We've got our meeting next, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've noticed her looking up at the sky every so
often in the middle of training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's been doing it more and more often as the
days go by, and the Kikuka Sho is less than a
month away. Even summer turning to fall doesn't
seem to change anything for her.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It's not often I get a visit from you. I take it this is
about what we discussed at summer camp?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: And Brian, I hear, is finally back to normal.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
However, even if you eliminate your regrets from
the summer, they may only be replaced with new
ones.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Moreover, the Kikuka Sho is drawing near. Even
so, you desire a scrimmage?
choice_data_list:
It's necessary precisely because the Kikuka Sho
is near.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...To think the day has come that I find myself
being asked to help an opponent.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
No way! The president is actually participating in
this scrimmage?! And against—

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
That's right! Brian! Although, wasn't she in the
hospital recently?

text_block_list.name: New Trainer
text_block_list.text: Sigh... This would normally be a dream matchup, but is this really the best for her right now?

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text:
She just recovered and is already facing the
Emperor. Wow, she sure is full of surprises.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Trainer... Are you sure?
choice_data_list: I think you should do this at least once.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I appreciate it. And... sorry.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I should have trusted you more from the
beginning.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You're my trainer, after all.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: All right then, Rudolf. Victory will be mine!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
"When the tiger roars, the wind itself rises." Then
I'll do the same.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...Let neither of us hold anything back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ka-thunk!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian takes off with great force as soon as
the race begins. Symboli Rudolf, however, has an
impressive start of her own.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Which of them will come out on top? The
audience watches with bated breath until, at
last...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Narita Brian loses by a neck.

text_block_list.name: New Trainer
text_block_list.text:
...Considering her health recently, she really put
up a good fight.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Even when in perfect health, racing against
Symboli Rudolf is quite an ordeal!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
It was an amazing race though! The president is
just too strong!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...All the spectators are gone.
choice_data_list: The race is over, after all.
The race is over, after all.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Yeah...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I realized my own arrogance. Even a
neck's difference is a firm margin.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I still can't reach her, even now.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I can't seem to get all the opportunities I missed
that summer out of my head.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
If I had just been able to race, then I thought I'd
be able to...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Or maybe I've been overestimating my own ability
to win.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...The reality is that I lost. I was weak. I have no
control over myself and can't fully measure my
own abilities.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
You noticed, right? That's why you had me run in
a race like this.
choice_data_list: I actually thought you could win.
I actually thought you could win.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Pfff... Hahaha! Idiot! I guess that makes two of us!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Let me run just one more time.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: This aching... This hunger... It's overpowering.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, Narita Brian takes to the track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's stronger than she was back in the spring and
the summer. Nothing will stop her progress.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...Brian.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Thanks for yesterday.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If you want to thank me, show your face in the
student council office once in while.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: When the time comes.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hmm. Well, I hope it comes quickly.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Also, I finally got a taste of your real strength.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: But don't think this is my limit.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
We're both going to reach greater heights. Next
time we race... I won't lose.

text_block_list.name: Bystanders
text_block_list.text: Chatter, chatter...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...Is that so?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Then... until "the time comes," as you said.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Word of Narita Brian's challenge to the Emperor
soon spreads throughout the school.
